updates.title: Air Plan Approval; Arizona; Attainment Plan for the Hayden SO2 Nonattainment Area for the 1971 and 2010 Sulfur Dioxide National Ambient Air Quality Standards
updates.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is proposing to approve revisions to the Arizona state implementation plan (SIP) for attaining the 1971 and 2010 sulfur dioxide (SO<INF>2</INF>) national ambient air quality standards (NAAQS or "standards") in the Hayden SO<INF>2</INF> nonattainment area. These SIP revisions, collectively referred to as the "Hayden SO<INF>2</INF> Plan" or "Plan," include A

updates.title: Approval and Promulgation of State Air Quality Plans for Designated Facilities and Pollutants; Texas; Control of Emissions From Existing Municipal Solid Waste Landfills
updates.summary: Pursuant to the Federal Clean Air Act (CAA or the Act), the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is proposing to approve the CAA section 111(d) state plan submitted by the State of Texas for sources subject to the Municipal Solid Waste (MSW) Landfills Emission Guidelines (EG). The Texas MSW landfills plan was submitted to fulfill the state's obligations under CAA section 111(d) to implement and e

updates.title: Procedures for Transportation Workplace Drug and Alcohol Testing Programs: Substance Abuse Professional and the Return-to-Duty Process
updates.summary: The Substance Abuse Professional (SAP) is the `gatekeeper' for the Department of Transportation's return-to-duty process (RTD). As the `gatekeeper', the SAP has a crucial role to play in recommending the level of treatment an employee may need in their path to returning to performing a safety-sensitive function after violating the DOT's drug and alcohol testing regulations. Given this critical rol

updates.title: Sunshine Act Meetings
updates.summary: Federal Register item (no abstract provided).

updates.title: Air Plan Approval; OR; Klamath Falls PM2.5 Redesignation to Attainment and Maintenance Plan
updates.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) proposes to approve an August 20, 2024 request by the Oregon Department of Environmental Quality (Oregon) to revise the attainment plan for the Klamath Falls, Oregon, nonattainment area; redesignate the Klamath Falls nonattainment area to attainment for the 2006 24-hour fine particulate matter (PM<INF>2.5</INF>) National Ambient Air Quality Standard (NAAQS

updates.title: Airworthiness Directives; Textron Aviation, Inc. (Type Certificate Previously Held by Cessna Aircraft Company) Airplanes
updates.summary: The FAA is correcting an airworthiness directive (AD) that was published in the Federal Register. That AD applies to all Textron Aviation, Inc., Model 525B airplanes. As published, there was an error in Table 1 to paragraph (g) of the AD. This document corrects that error. In all other respects, the original document remains the same.

updates.title: Farmer Bridge Assistance (FBA) Program; Approval of Information Collection Request
updates.summary: The final rule entitled Farmer Bridge Assistance (FBA) Program was published on February 23, 2026. The Office of Management and Budget cleared the associated information collection requirements (ICR) on February 26, 2026. This document announces approval of the ICR.

updates.title: Records Schedules; Notice of Withdrawal
updates.summary: When the records schedule notice was published on February 26, 2026, at 91 FR 9658, the link to the URL for the regulations.gov docket for the schedules was incorrect. Due to this clerical error, the notice will be withdrawn and the schedules will be reposted as soon as possible in a new notice, allowing the full 45-day comment period for the public to submit comments.

updates.title: Glycine From the People's Republic of China: Notice of Final Results of Antidumping Duty Changed Circumstances Review
updates.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) determines, in the context of this changed circumstances review (CCR) of the antidumping duty (AD) order on glycine from the People's Republic of China (China), that Salvi Chemical Industries Ltd. (Salvi) is ineligible to participate in the importer certification process because Salvi failed to demonstrate that it no longer uses Chinese-origin glycine in

updates.title: New Mexico Statewide Municipal Separate Storm Sewer System (MS4) General Permit Proposal
updates.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Region 6 is providing notice of a proposed National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) Statewide general permit for storm water discharges from municipal separate storm sewer systems (MS4s) located in urbanized areas in the State of New Mexico. This permit offers discharge authorization to regulated MS4s within the boundaries of the Bureau of t

updates.title: Infusion Pump Software Correction: Fresenius Kabi Issues Correction for Ivenix Large Volume Pump Software
updates.summary: Fresenius Kabi is correcting Ivenix LVP software due to anomalies that could cause serious patient harm or death

updates.title: Early Alert: Heart Pump Purge Cassette Issue from Abiomed
updates.summary: Impella Generation 1 Purge Cassettes have an increased risk of purge leaks. Purge leaks can lead to low pump pressure and pump stops

updates.title: Stent Recall: Boston Scientific Removes Certain AXIOS Stents and Electrocautery-Enhanced Delivery Systems
updates.summary: Boston Scientific is removing certain stents and delivery systems due to issues with deployment and expansion.

updates.title: Insufflation Unit Recall: Olympus Removes High Flow Insufflation Units
updates.summary: Olympus is removing certain High Flow Insufflation Unit models due to software issues that may lead to overpressure events.

updates.title: Early Alert: Trividia Health Issues Correction for TRUE METRIX Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems
updates.summary: Trividia recommends that device users who receive an E-5 error code and are experiencing symptoms of high glucose should seek medical care immediately

updates.title: Electronic Homecare Bed Correction: Medline Updates Use Instructions for Homecare Beds
updates.summary: Medline updates use instructions for Electronic Homecare Beds due to risk of electrical fires and entrapment.

updates.title: Emergency Response Safety Kit Recall: Airlife Removes Certain Broselow Pediatric Emergency Rainbow Tapes and Broselow ALS Organizers
updates.summary: AirLife is removing Broselow Rainbow Tapes due to incorrectly printed medication dosing information.

updates.title: Trividia Health, Inc. Initiates Labeling Correction for all TRUE METRIX® Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems
updates.summary: FT. LAUDERDALE, FL) – February 6, 2026 – Trividia Health, Inc., announced today that it is initiating a labeling correction which requires a modification of the Owner’s Booklets/System Instructions for Use for all TRUE METRIX, TRUE METRIX AIR, TRUE METRIX GO, and TRUE METRIX PRO Blood Glucose Monit

updates.title: Glucose Monitor Sensor Recall: Abbott Diabetes Care Removes Certain FreeStyle Libre 3 and FreeStyle Libre 3 Plus Sensors
updates.summary: Certain Abbott Diabetes Care Continuous Glucose Monitor sensors may incorrect or lower than actual glucose readings

updates.title: Detachable Coil System Recall: J&J MedTech/CERENOVUS Inc. Remove CEREPAK Detachable Coil System
updates.summary: MedTech/CERENOVUS is removing CEREPAK Detachable Coil Systems due to a higher than expected failure to detach rate
